name: Long-Horizon VRP Scheduling System
description: Multi-depot, multi-driver vehicle routing and scheduling system for a used cooking oil collection company, covering 2-3 month planning horizons.
highlights: Solved multi-depot, multi-driver VRP across 2-3 month rolling horizons using OR-Tools — far beyond typical single-day planners
Self-hosted OpenRouteService instance to generate real-world distance and duration matrices without third-party API costs
Implemented rolling-horizon decomposition to break an intractable long-term schedule into overlapping, solvable sub-problems
Built a customer oil-volume prediction module to forecast future pickup quantities, enabling proactive route planning

name: Genetic Algorithm VRP Engine
description: Custom metaheuristic solver for multi-depot, multi-driver vehicle routing for daily used cooking oil pickup operations.
highlights: Designed an enhanced genetic algorithm combining Tabu Search and Adaptive Memory Programming for high-quality VRP solutions
Handles multi-depot, multi-driver constraints for real-world daily pickup scheduling in the used cooking oil logistics domain
Adaptive memory mechanism stores and reuses elite partial solutions to escape local optima more effectively than standard GA
Outperformed off-the-shelf OR-Tools configurations on company-specific instances due to domain-tuned operators

name: Talk With Me — Personal AI Assistant
description: A personal AI chatbot deployed on HuggingFace Spaces that represents me as an intelligent assistant for website visitors.
highlights: Built a full-stack AI chatbot from scratch using FastAPI backend and vanilla JS frontend — no React, no build step
Integrated Groq's Llama 3.3 70B for fast, high-quality streaming responses with real-time SSE token delivery
Implemented custom tool-calling layer with artifact filtering to handle Llama's text-based function call format gracefully
Deployed on HuggingFace Spaces via Docker with a polished responsive UI including dark mode, suggestion chips, and email CTA

name: AI Explorer Hub
description: A curated web platform for discovering and exploring AI tools, models, and resources.
highlights: Built and deployed a fully functional AI tools discovery platform on Vercel
Developed in TypeScript for type-safe, maintainable frontend code
Designed clean, responsive UI for browsing and filtering AI resources

name: E-commerce Analytical MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol server exposing e-commerce analytics capabilities to LLM agents.
highlights: Built an MCP server that exposes structured e-commerce analytics as tools consumable by LLM agents like Claude
Enables AI agents to query sales data, customer segments, and product performance through natural language
Follows the MCP standard for interoperability with any MCP-compatible AI client

name: Data Science Class Files
description: Jupyter notebooks covering core data science and machine learning topics from coursework.
highlights: Comprehensive collection of notebooks covering EDA, feature engineering, and ML model development
Covers classification, regression, clustering, and dimensionality reduction techniques

name: Network Science Book
description: A Quarto-based interactive book for a Network Science university course.
highlights: Authored a full course book on network science using Quarto for rich, interactive publishing
Covers graph theory, centrality measures, community detection, and real-world network analysis in R
Designed for academic use with LaTeX-quality typesetting and interactive code outputs
